title: Excalibur | Transmog support
description: This resource pack redraws the Transmog mod in the Excalibur style
body:
This unofficial compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Transmog](https://modrinth.com/mod/transmog) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack.

**Credits:**
- Maffhew – Creator of Excalibur
- Hidoni - Creator of Transmog
